tab_bar.style: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-24 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A1428]/80 border-t border-[#242E42] pb-safe flex justify-around items-center px-6 z-50

card_solid.style: bg-[#12182B] border border-[#242E42] rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm

card_glass.style: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]
card_glass.description: Used for Morning Brief and emotional/calm segments

floating_action_button.style: fixed bottom-28 right-6 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#0A1428] border border-[#00E5C0]/50 flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(0,229,192,0.25)] hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,229,192,0.5)] hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300 z-50

chip_inactive.style: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#1A2235] border border-[#242E42] text-sm text-[#A0ABC0] flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#242E42] transition-colors

chip_active.style: px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#00E5C0]/10 border border-[#00E5C0]/50 text-[#00E5C0] text-sm flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors

avatar.description: Elegant dark mode portrait for user profile settings

decision_engine_orb.description: Abstract glowing orb representing the AI assistant. Use in the decision engine modal background.

morning_coffee.description: Minimalist morning vibe for the morning brief card overlay

weather_abstract.description: Dark atmospheric cloud/weather abstract for the weather card background

icons.style_notes: Use strokeWidth={1.5} for a premium, lightweight feel. Scale sizes to 24px or 28px for mobile tap targets.

morning_brief.layout: Vertical scroll layout. Top: greeting H1 and Overline Date. Middle: Weather glass card (with weather_abstract image as 30% opacity bg). Bottom: Horizontal scroll list for 'Top 3 Priorities'.

instant_decision_engine.layout: Bottom sheet modal or full-screen glass overlay. Features a central 'decision_engine_orb' image, with staggered active suggestion chips (e.g. 'What should I eat?') floating around it.

daily_flow_dashboard.layout: Strict Bento grid. 2-column mobile layout. Top wide card for 'Time', square cards for 'Money' and 'Health', vertical card for 'Energy'.

evening_wind_down.layout: Deep dark gradient background (mixing #0A1428 with black). Central typography focus. Sequential fading text summarizing the day, and a minimalistic spending summary bar chart (recharts).

settings_profile.layout: List view. Top: Avatar image centered. Right-aligned switches for Family Sharing and AI Training. Subtle 1px border dividers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for a mobile-first web app experience mimicking a native React Native Expo feel (generous safe areas, fixed bottom nav, bottom sheets).
Use SF Pro Display for headings with tight tracking (tracking-tight) to ensure the premium look, and Inter for highly readable body text.
The UI must feel 'calm' and 'quiet'. Rely heavily on negative space (generous padding like p-6/p-8) rather than dense dividers.
Do NOT use pure white (#FFFFFF) for text. Use #A0ABC0 (secondary) for descriptions and max #FFFFFF/90 for main titles to reduce eye strain.
The FAB must be implemented as a glowing orb that pulses softly. This is the central piece of the app.
For the daily flow dashboard, implement a bento grid using CSS Grid (grid-cols-2) and combine col-span classes to make diverse card shapes.
Apply `data-testid` to ALL interactive elements, tabs, and switches as specified in the testing section.
